home.title: Hello, I am a Full-Stack developer specialised in Frontend development with high knowledge in Digital Marketing.
home.subName: Software engineer / AI & CrossFit / Always in beta
home.workText: I am currently a full stack in TravelPort. I like to create new products and help people to develop their ideas. And when I am not online, I like to play sports.
home.dai: Completed CFGS for DAI(Development of Computer Applications)
home.grafix: Worked at Grafix Gestio Informatica! Barcelona
home.techStackSubtitle: Technologies I use day by day
home.aboutDescription: Software engineer building weird systems, AI agents and fast interfaces.
home.aboutContext: Currently at Travelport. Previously shipped MVPs for startups from scratch.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on development, technology, and digital trends
blog.comingSoonText: I''m preparing amazing content about development, technology and programming. Come back soon!

works.textTravelport: Software Development Engineer at Travelport since 2022. Building plugin workflows for a global travel commerce platform operating in 165+ countries, with a focus on the frontend of the Search form.
works.travelportItem1: Plugin workflows and integrations for travel commerce platforms used by airlines, hotels and agencies worldwide.
works.travelportItem2: Frontend focus on the Search form — the core booking experience for travellers.
works.travelportItem3: Component architecture, UI performance and cross-browser compatibility across the product.
works.travelportGdsNote: Travelport is a global distribution system (GDS) and travel commerce platform operating in 165+ countries.
works.textPersonal: Personal portfolio and services website built with Next.js and TypeScript. Showcases my experience, projects, and technical skills. Optimised for performance, accessibility and SEO.
works.textAppKumux: Internal web platform for lighting designers at Kumux, built in pure React. Allows teams to create, configure and visualise custom lighting products in real time before production.
works.textKumux: Corporate website for Kumux, a lighting innovation company based in Barcelona. Developed with Gatsby and JavaScript, focused on performance and visual storytelling to communicate the brand values.
works.textPideme: SaaS platform that lets restaurant customers scan a QR code, browse the menu, place orders and pay directly from their table — no app download required. Built with PHP and Laravel, integrated with kitchen display systems.
works.textIA: Telemedicine platform built for the Chilean health system, leveraging AI to assist doctors in early diagnostics. Developed with React, Gatsby and Strapi as a headless CMS.
works.textMedia: Telemedicine platform with AI-assisted diagnostics. Doctors can review patient data, run AI-powered analysis and issue remote consultations. Built with React, Gatsby and a Strapi backend.
works.texthelp: Fundraising landing page created to support an event raising money for hospitalised children. Built with HTML, CSS and Tailwind CSS, focused on emotional impact and conversion.
works.textAQD: B2B e-commerce for an industrial safety products distributor. Built with PHP and PrestaShop, with custom catalogue management, bulk pricing and a client portal for recurring orders.
works.textAvocado: Full e-commerce store built as a hands-on project to learn Next.js. Includes product listings, cart management, and checkout flow. Deployed on Vercel.
works.textWeatherApp: Weather forecast app built to practise React with Redux for state management, Jest for unit testing, and the useEffect hook for async API calls to a public weather API.
works.textLittlebox: E-commerce platform for a subscription box brand targeting camping and outdoor enthusiasts. Built with PHP and PrestaShop, with custom subscription logic and seasonal catalogue management.
works.textCryptoTracker: Mobile app built with React Native that lists live cryptocurrency prices and market data, pulling from a public API. A practical project to explore cross-platform mobile development.
works.textScrapper: Automation script written in JavaScript using Selenium to monitor available slots in my CrossFit gym and automatically book a spot when one opens up — so I never miss a class.

experience.title: Experience
experience.travelportDescription: Building plugin workflows and platform SDKs for a global travel commerce company. Working on developer tooling, API integrations and frontend performance for products used by airlines, hotels and travel agencies worldwide.
experience.kumuxText: Corporate website for Kumux built with Gatsby and JavaScript.
experience.textAppkumux: Internal app for lighting designers, built in pure React.
experience.textAQD: B2B e-commerce for an industrial safety products distributor, built with PHP and PrestaShop.
experience.textLittlebox: E-commerce for a subscription box brand targeting camping and outdoor enthusiasts.

experiments.title: Lab
experiments.freakwtf: This site. Next.js, Chakra UI v3, interactive terminal with AI memory (RAG), 3D voxel avatar, i18n. An ongoing playground for ideas.
experiments.beefyGuardian: Automated DeFi portfolio manager for Beefy Finance. Monitors vault APYs, auto-compounds rewards and rebalances positions using a LAZY HIGH strategy — chase the highest-yield vaults but only rebalance when the APY gap crosses a threshold, keeping gas costs low.
experiments.aiDevFlow: Multi-agent AI system for software dev workflows. An orchestrator coordinates specialised agents (reviewer, critic, vision-capable) to automate code review and iteration.
experiments.homeAssistant: Home automation setup using Home Assistant. Devices, automations and dashboards for the house. More hobby than project.
experiments.textPideme: SaaS platform for restaurants: QR menu, table ordering and integrated payment. A freelance project that taught me a lot about product and clients.
experiments.textMedia: Telemedicine platform with AI-assisted diagnostics built for the Chilean health system. Developed with React, Gatsby and Strapi.
experiments.textPersonal: Previous personal portfolio and services website built with Next.js and TypeScript.

timeline.title: My Timeline
timeline.subtitle: A journey through the most important moments of my life, from my first steps in technology to where I am today.
timeline.continues: The story continues... Every day is an opportunity to add new milestones to this timeline.

1989.title: 🐣 Birth
1989.description: I was born in Barcelona at the end of the year.

1995.title: 🎮 First video console
1995.description: I got my first video console as a gift. A Sega Mega Drive!

1997.title: 🎮 Gameboy
1997.description: I got my first Gameboy as a gift and with it I became increasingly passionate about technology.

2003.title: ⌨️ First computer
2003.description: I have my first computer: A Pentium 4 with 256MB of RAM + 📞 Internet. But only from 6 PM onwards and leaving my parents without a phone.

2005.title: 🌐 DSL Internet
2005.description: DSL arrives and with it WoW, Counter Strike and LAG :(

2011.title: 🇮🇹 Erasmus & First job
2011.description: I work at Zimbra in Italy as an Erasmus student. I start working at Punt Informatic.

2012.title: 💼 Grafix & 📚 Courses
2012.description: I start at Grafix Gestió Informàtica and take Android and Java courses.

2013.title: 🎓 DAI Completed
2013.description: I finish the CFGS for DAI (Development of Computer Applications) at IES Carles Vallbona, Granollers.

2014.title: 🏃 Running + Colleagues
2014.description: I start being a "Runner" and two great colleagues arrive at the company: Marti Duran and Marc Girbau.

2015.title: 🐶 La Menta
2015.description: La Menta, a little dog, arrives home.

2017.title: 🏋️ CrossFit & Crypto
2017.description: I start with CrossFit and investing in cryptocurrencies ₿.

2018.title: 🏃 Half marathon & ✈️ Albania
2018.description: I do a mountain half marathon and a 10k. I travel to Albania 🇦🇱 where my perspective on how the world works changes.

2019.title: 🏋️ CrossFit & 🚀 Gametravel
2019.description: First competition and injury in crossfit. Creation of the Gametravel brand in the university incubator in Mataró.

2020.title: 🎓 IOT & 🚀 Kumux & 🦠 COVID
2020.description: I finish a UOC course taught by Oriol Rius on IOT. I join Kumux as Frontend Developer — building React visualizations for colorimetric data and launching the company website with Gatsby.js. COVID-19 keeps us in quarantine. 🏠 #StayHome.

2021.title: 💼 Freelance & 🚀 Pideme.es
2021.description: I leave Kumux and go freelance under the freak.wtf brand. I lead end-to-end MVP development for startups and build Pideme.es — a QR-based ordering system so restaurant customers can order and pay from the table. Stack: React, Next.js, TailwindCSS, Node.js, Strapi.

2022.title: ✈️ Travelport & 👥 New friends
2022.description: I join Travelport as Software Development Engineer. I start on the SDK & Plugin Framework team building developer SDKs for booking APIs (flights, trains, hotels) and CI pipelines for partner plugins. I meet great people and grow a lot.

2023.title: 🏔️ Iceland vacation
2023.description: I finally fulfilled my dream of seeing the northern lights. An incredible trip to Iceland that will be forever etched in my memory. ✨ Aurora Borealis magic!

2024.title: 🏠 Closer to the city
2024.description: We move closer to the city. An important change that brings us closer to new opportunities and urban experiences.

2025.title: 🐩 Pam arrives & 💻 New AI computer
2025.description: Pam arrives, a mini toy poodle that has us in love. I finally buy a new computer designed to work with AI - I had been using my old computer for almost 20 years, it was really ready to retire.
